input.tenant_message: There is a strong burning plastic smell coming from the wall near my kitchen outlet. I noticed it this morning and it got stronger throughout the day. I unplugged everything from that outlet but the smell is still there. This is really scaring me — please send someone ASAP.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch a licensed electrician immediately — a burning plastic smell from a wall outlet is a strong indicator of overheated wiring or arcing, both of which are serious fire hazards. Advise tenant to avoid using any outlets on that wall and to keep a fire extinguisher accessible. If the smell intensifies or visible smoke appears, instruct tenant to evacuate and call 911.
